name: Hydra32 (ESP32-Deauther)
label: Hydra32 (ESP32-Deauther) — authorized testing only
description: Hydra32 / ESP32-Deauther (SameerAlSahab) — WiFi recon + deauth toolkit for the ESP32 DevKit V1. *** Authorized security testing on networks you own or are permitted to test ONLY — unauthorized deauthentication is illegal in most jurisdictions. *** GPL-3.0. Cyber Controller flashes the pinned, SHA-256-verified release images and adds no attack capability of its own.

firmware_urls.note: ESP-IDF project; the 'Hydra32' release ships prebuilt bootloader/partition-table/app/storage bins. Pinned + SHA-256-verified at flash time, never vendored.

note: esptool offsets confirmed from partitions.csv (branch devkit-v1): bootloader@0x1000, partition-table@0x8000, factory app@0x10000, spiffs storage@0x190000. Single-factory layout = no boot_app0. storage.bin is exactly 0x70000 bytes = the storage partition size (cross-check of the 0x190000 offset).

assets.name: projecthydra-32.bin
assets.label: Hydra32 ESP32 app image (authorized testing only)
